title: Envoy
content:
Prince, show me the quickest way and best
    To gain the subject of my moan;
    We've neither spinsters nor relics out West--
    These do I love, and these alone.
meaning:
Eugene Field's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Envoy"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
